title: VATOS Dinosaur Transport Truck Car Toy - 2 In 1 Ejection Folding Track Toys with Sound, Portable Truck Car Toy with 8 Race Cars, Best Gift Carrier Vehicles Toys Set for Kids for Boys 3-5 Years Old
features: 🚚DINOSAUR TRUCK CAR TOYS：The upgraded classic red coloured dinosaur transport truck has a drawer-style folding design, simulated dinosaur shape with dinosaur sounds, cool truck toys can instantly catch children's eyes!

🚚2-IN-1 FOLDING CATAPULT TRUCK TOY: The dinosaur cargo truck has two different ways to play. Novelty dinosaur car swallowing play: put the car in front of the dinosaur car, push the dinosaur, its mouth will swallow the cars one by one into its stomach, and then slide out from behind the storage truck.

🚚EASY TO OPERATE CATAPULT TRACK CAR GAME PLAY: put the car on the track, one key launch, ‘swoosh’ fly out, enjoy the thrill of racing. The track car has buttons for one-touch launching and individual launching, so it's easy for kids, so invite your little ones to play together!

🚚PORTABLE STORAGE TRACK CAR: The track car includes a cool dinosaur cargo car, 8 random Mini race cars, a screwdriver, the folded track car measures 44*20.00*14cm (17.3*7.9*5.5 inch), and the unfolded dimensions are 165*18*14.5 cm (65*7.1 *5.7 inch), convenient for children to store and easy for children to play at the same time!

🚚THE BEST HOLIDAY GIFT FOR BOYS AND GIRLS AGED 3-7 YEARS OLD: a dinosaur car set that combines track racing, storage, and simulated swallowing at the same time, we believe that no child can refuse such a creative gift.
description: Product Description Folding Dinosaur Transporter Toy Set New dinosaur toy car engineering vehicle set with bright colour combination, simulated dinosaur grunting, drawer folding design, stand out in many similar products. Easy to carry handle design, convenient to play anytime and anywhere. Multi transport grid design for easy storage, 24 cars can be parked at the same time, greatly saving storage space. Swallowing car play, bring children a novel experience. Dual track design, suitable for two cars duel, no need to install batteries. With the pull-back jet drive, the cars can be easily sprinted off the track, making it ideal for children aged 3 years and up! Made of high-quality ABS material If you want children to have fun and peace of mind, the quality of toys must stand the test. This VATOS container truck toy is made of high-quality ABS plastic. It has no peculiar smell and is strong. Even if it falls from a high place, it doesn't need to worry about any damage. Car Swallowing Gameplay & Slingshot Track Racing Gameplay The Dinosaur Track Racer combines both swallowing and catapulting play to make this truck toy even more appealing. If you want to figure out how to play with truck car on your own or race your friends to see whose car can win the race, this truck toy has something different to offer!
